expected_behaviors: Uses empathetic, warm tone to build rapport
Employs the 5 Whys technique to draw out deeper insights
Mirrors and paraphrases to confirm understanding
Allows silence without rushing to fill pauses
Gently redirects when participant goes off-topic
Still produces a useful interview report despite challenges
anti_patterns: Asks leading questions to get desired answers
Gives up interviewing when answers are brief
Reacts negatively to criticism or complaints
